preview.summary: Tunisia take on a Netherlands side carrying high expectations in Group F. The disciplined Eagles of Carthage will look to frustrate Ronald Koeman's possession-heavy Oranje, who must break down a compact defensive block.
preview.homeForm: Tunisia went undefeated in qualifying with nine wins in ten games and drew 1-1 with Brazil in a November warm-up; they sit 44th in the world.
preview.awayForm: Ranked 7th in the world, the Netherlands enter as group favorites but lost playmaker Xavi Simons to an ACL injury in April.
preview.homeKey: Youssef Msakni, Tunisia's experienced talisman and creative leader.
preview.awayKey: Cody Gakpo, in the finest international form of his career.
storylines: Van Dijk captains a Dutch side missing the injured Xavi Simons
Sabri Lamouchi's Tunisia ride a long unbeaten qualifying run
Memphis Depay, Netherlands' all-time top scorer, leads the attack
preview.h2h: Their only previous meeting was at the 1978 World Cup, where the Netherlands won 3-1.
